_readme: Product text translations. Keys are product IDs. Only text fields are included — no prices, IDs, paths, or config values. Safe to send to a translator as-is. Falls back to product JSON defaults if a key is missing.

arc-floor-lamp.name: Arc Floor Lamp
arc-floor-lamp.description: A statement piece for any living space. The arc floor lamp combines Scandinavian minimalism with warm ambient lighting. The powder-coated steel arc arm extends gracefully, suspending a spun-aluminium shade that casts a soft, focused light ideal for reading corners or beside a sofa. Available in Matte Black and Brushed Gold finishes. Fits standard E27 bulbs up to 40W.

globe-pendant.name: Globe Pendant
globe-pendant.description: Hand-blown smoky glass encases a filament bulb. Equally at home above a kitchen island or a bedside table. Available in Smoke, Clear, and Amber glass.

concrete-desk-lamp.name: Concrete Desk Lamp
concrete-desk-lamp.description: Cast in raw concrete with a brass neck and adjustable shade. Heavy enough to anchor your desk, light enough to redirect anywhere you need it. Available in Raw Concrete, Washed White, and Obsidian Black.

half-moon-sconce.name: Half Moon Sconce
half-moon-sconce.description: A half-moon of ribbed white glass casts a warm glow upward and downward. Mounts flush to any wall.

lamp-cable-3m.name: Textile Cable 3m
lamp-cable-3m.description: Braided cotton textile cable in a natural off-white finish. 3 metres long with inline switch. Compatible with all E27 pendant fittings.

dimmer-switch.name: Inline Dimmer Switch
dimmer-switch.description: Touch-sensitive inline dimmer compatible with dimmable LED and halogen bulbs. Simply splice into any standard lamp cable. Smooth 1–100% dimming range.

replacement-bulb-e27.name: Edison Bulb E27 4W
replacement-bulb-e27.description: Warm 2200K filament LED in classic Edison style. Dimmable. E27 base, A60 shape. 4W equivalent to 40W incandescent. Rated 15,000 hours.
